title: FOSTER, ADOPT, AND KINSHIP - 211info
text: BEAVERTON CHILD WELFARE AND SELF-SUFFICIENCY FOSTER, ADOPT, AND KINSHIP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Recruits, trains, and supports foster and kinship caregivers. Provides resources and connections, including support groups for resource providers, adoptive parents, and kinship caregive 15425 NW Greenbrier Parkway Beaverton, OR 970066002 Eligibility: ODHS resource parents, adoptive parents, and kinship providers who are certified with ODHS Child Welfare Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed on major holidays Email (503) 646-7234 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 646-7234 Abuse Reporting Line (855) 503-7233 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit the website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 67 Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups Caregiver Training * Foster Parents Foster Parent/Family Recruitment In Person Support Groups * Foster Parents In Person Support Groups * Kinship Caregivers Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD ABUSE REPORTING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD WELFARE SERVICES PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - EMPLOYMENT RELATED DAYCARE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SNAP PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SUMMER EBT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - TEMPORARY ASSISTANCE FOR NEEDY FAMILIES PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - TEMPORARY ASSISTANCE TO DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SURVIVORS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEAVERTON CHILD WELFARE AND SELF-SUFFICIENCY
